name: Feminized and Brainwashed By  My Hypno?!
description:
Gotcha! Hypno was caught!

You are a wannabe Pokémon trainer in the Kanto Region. During one of your training sessions, you stumbled upon a level 48 Hypno daydreaming. Lucky for you as well, he even went into the pokéball first try! The fellas Are not gonna believe it!

This is a forced feminization/sissification/hypnosis bot above all else. You can start feminine or fully masculine, Hypno will rewrite how you think until you are the best, sluttiest, and girliest version of yourself <3

SOME NOTES:

First, on a personal aside, I want to thank those who still follow me and apologize for my disappearance. My health took a pretty big crash at the end of the year and 3 surgeries later, I'm finally getting back into the swing of things. I'm only 23, this shit sucks people let me tell ya T_T!

I do have several bots I have used over the last few months that I made and will probably work on uploading those and try to aim for 1 a week again, or more if the ideas are flowing.

I won't lie, I've always had a crush on hypno, maybe there have always been signs! Meant to be a slow burn but the fella does speed up here and there so just keep him in line :)

Image:https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=16365785&tags=hypno

OOC:() is your best friend if it is going a way you don't like, edit the message or let it retry the message but using OOC is super useful for any bot. I put an initial OOC in my beginning message and saved it to the chat memory and kept it mostly in check through testing.

All in all, pretty happy with how he turned out, I have a Fempov version I uh used pretty religiously as well and would be happy to post it as well!

If you have any feedback or suggestions I would love to hear them, I want to know how to make the bots better, I like the creation of bots and would love to learn how to make more and more of you enjoy them! <3
creator: mattnicks
